creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Awsome :-) Hotplug would be a great feature for my Bluetooth headset attached/detached on the fly! So far I had to kill PA daemon by hand :-)

One last thing missing would be to have Bluetooth and Hotplug/Devd react on Bluetooth connections, starting virtual_oss, then reloading PulseAudio.. and FreeBSD will be fully featured multimedia station! :-)
